morning.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 at a steep discount to its top model as the company races toward a blockbuster IPO
morning.summary: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5, a more affordable version of its top model, as it prepares for an IPO.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM acquires Red Hat to create a leading hybrid cloud provider.

morning.title: Google kills Tenor GIF API, forcing changes at X, Discord, and more
morning.summary: Google shut down the Tenor GIF API, affecting multiple platforms that relied on it for GIF sharing.

morning.title: The ‘Father of the Internet’ is finally retiring
morning.summary: The 'Father of the Internet' announces his retirement after a long and influential career in shaping the internet.

morning.title: Agriculture is ready for AI, but its data isn’t
morning.summary: The agricultural sector is poised to adopt AI, but it lacks the necessary data infrastructure to support it.

morning.title: ByteDance is building a $39B data center complex in a free-trade zone in Brazil's Ceará
morning.summary: ByteDance is investing in a massive data center complex in Brazil to expand its infrastructure.

morning.title: Meta introduces a $20/month Meta One Premium tier for its glasses and limits its Conversation Focus feature to three hours of use per month for free users
morning.summary: Meta introduces a premium tier for its glasses with additional features and limits free usage of the Conversation Focus feature.

morning.title: Google's Gemini Omni Flash hits the API, turning enterprise video production into a conversation
morning.summary: Google's Gemini Omni Flash API enables enterprise video production to be more conversational and interactive.

morning.title: The US sentences Guo Wengui, a self-exiled billionaire Chinese tycoon who defrauded his online followers out of hundreds of millions, to 30 years in prison
morning.summary: A Chinese billionaire is sentenced to 30 years in prison for defrauding his online followers out of hundreds of millions of dollars.

morning.title: Meituan open sources LongCat-2.0, the 1.6T, near-frontier agentic coding model that's been leading OpenRouter — trained entirely on Chinese chips
morning.summary: Meituan open-sources its LongCat-2.0 model, a 1.6T agentic coding model trained on Chinese chips, leading the OpenRouter project.

gym.title: Nir Eyal | Beyond Belief
gym.summary: Nir Eyal discusses his work on habit formation and behavioral design, providing insights into how to create lasting change.

gym.title: The Agentic AI Engineer - Benedikt Sanftl, Mutagent
gym.summary: Benedikt Sanftl talks about the role of the agentic AI engineer, emphasizing the importance of this position in AI development.

gym.title: Vivian Tu | Well Endowed
gym.summary: Vivian Tu discusses her experiences and insights on personal growth, wellbeing, and self-improvement.

gym.title: The ERP for the AI Revolution is here
gym.summary: This talk explores the concept of an ERP system designed for the AI revolution, discussing its potential and implications.

gym.title: How to Build a Self-Improving Company with AI
gym.summary: This video provides insights into how companies can leverage AI to create self-improving systems and processes.
